blogs.title: MUI X v6.18.0 and the latest features before the next major
blogs.subtitle: New components, polished features, better performance and more.
blogs.content: Blog posts that grab the audience’s attention are the blog posts that perform. Leverage data from millions of top-performing marketing assets to fine-tune your content to get the attention it deserves.
blogs.Author: José Freitas

blogs.title: Evolving MUI's core values and behaviors
blogs.subtitle: After significant growth, we united as a team to rediscover the values that underpin our shared success.
